issues.description: First effect should trigger when this Character battles ＜Strike＞ attribute Characters, not on all attacks. Condition is missing the attribute check (LeaderHasType or similar for opponent's character type). Current condition is 'Always' which is incorrect.

OnAttacked trigger is incorrect. The card text describes a single battle condition ('When this Character battles ＜Strike＞ attribute Characters'), not a separate defensive trigger. OnAttacked should not be present.

Condition uses HasRestingDon with count:1, but the effect requires paying DON!! (returning them to deck). The condition should verify the character has at least 1 DON!! attached, which is correct, but semantically this is a cost not a condition check.
